qtype: Fraction of a subset from data
tex:
The stem-and-leaf diagram shows the ages of 21 people.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{l|llllllll}
1 & 6 & 9 & & & & & & \\
2 & 1 & 4 & 4 & 5 & & & & \\
3 & 2 & 6 & 7 & 9 & & & & \\
4 & 0 & 2 & 4 & 6 & & & & \\
5 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 7 & 8 & 8 & 9 \\
\end{tabular}
Key : $1|6$ represents 16 years

(a) Find the fraction of people who are more than 30 years old.
\newline

(b) Work out the range.
\newline

(c) Find the median.
\newline
